text: Albus Dumbledore is the headmaster of Hogwarts.
Albus Dumbledore is the headmaster of Hogwarts.
Aragog is a giant spider in the forest.
Arthur Weasley works at the Ministry of Magic.
Aurors are dark wizard catchers.
Bellatrix Lestrange is a loyal Death Eater.
Buckbeak is a hippogriff befriended by Harry.
Centaur creatures live in the Forbidden Forest.
Chocolate can calm Dementors temporarily.
Death Eaters serve Voldemort.
Defense Against the Dark Arts is a crucial subject.
Dementors feed on happy memories.
Diagon Alley is a magical shopping street.
Divination is taught by Professor Trelawney.
Dobby is a house-elf.
Draco is a Slytherin student.
Dudley Dursley is Harry's cousin.
Dumbledore's Army trains in the Room of Requirement.
Expecto Patronum is the Patronus spell.
Fawkes is Dumbledore's loyal phoenix.
Fluffy guards the Philosopher's Stone.
Fluffy is a three-headed dog.
Fred and George Weasley love pranks.
Hagrid delivers Harry's Hogwarts letter.
Hagrid has a pet dragon named Norbert.
Hagrid is the Keeper of Keys and Grounds at Hogwarts.
Harry and his friends search for Horcruxes.
Harry buys his wand at Ollivanders.
Harry can speak Parseltongue.
Harry duels Voldemort in the graveyard.
Harry fights trolls and other magical creatures.
Harry finds the prophecy with his friends.
Harry is in Gryffindor house.
Harry is known as 'The Boy Who Lived'.
Harry learns Occlumency from Snape.
Harry learns the Patronus Charm to fight Dementors.
Harry often visits Hogsmeade on weekends.
Harry participates in the Triwizard Tournament.
Harry plays Seeker for Gryffindor Quidditch team.
Harry plays wizard chess during challenges.
Harry Potter is 11 years old
Harry Potter is a young wizard.
Harry receives a letter to attend Hogwarts on his 11th birthday.
Harry receives his first broom from Professor McGonagall.
Harry saves Ginny Weasley from the Chamber of Secrets.
Harry sees Thestrals pulling the carriages.
Harry shares a compartment with Ron on the train.
Harry views memories in Dumbledore's Pensieve.
Harry's parents, James and Lily, were killed by Voldemort.
He catches the Golden Snitch during matches.
He faces dragons and mermaids in the tournament.
He meets Draco Malfoy on the train.
He studies at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.
He studies at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.
Hermione carries a Time-Turner in her first year.
Hermione Granger is very smart.
Hermione Granger is very smart.
Hippogriffs are magical creatures with wings and lion bodies.
Hogsmeade is the only all-wizarding village in Britain.
Hogwarts Express takes students to Hogwarts.
Hogwarts has four houses: Gryffindor, Slytherin, Hufflepuff, and Ravenclaw.
Honeydukes sells chocolate frogs and Bertie Bott's beans.
House-elves serve wizards but can be freed.
Invisibility is useful for sneaking around Hogwarts.
Legilimency is reading someone else's mind.
Madam Pince is the librarian at Hogwarts.
Magical broomsticks include the Nimbus 2000 and Firebolt.
Magical creatures live in Hogwarts and surrounding areas.
Magical portraits can talk and move.
Magical portraits in Hogwarts move and talk.
Magical shops sell wands, potions, and brooms.
Magical spells have incantations and wand movements.
Magical sweets come from Honeydukes.
Molly Weasley is very caring.
Nicolas Flamel created the Philosopher's Stone.
Occlumency protects your mind from intrusion.
Parseltongue is the language of snakes.
Petunia Dursley is Harry's aunt.
Platform 9¾ is where the train departs.
Polyjuice Potion allows you to change appearance.
Potions class is taught by Professor Snape.
Professor McGonagall teaches Transfiguration.
Prophecies are often vague and mysterious.
Quidditch is a popular sport at Hogwarts.
Quidditch matches are exciting and competitive.
Ron Weasley is Harry's best friend.
Sirius Black is Harry's godfather.
Sirius was wrongly imprisoned in Azkaban.
The Burrow is the Weasley family house.
The Chamber of Secrets holds a dangerous secret.
The Dark Mark is Voldemort's symbol.
The Deathly Hallows are three powerful magical objects.
The Dementors guard Azkaban prison.
The Dursleys are Harry's non-magical relatives.
The Elder Wand is unbeatable in duels.
The Fat Lady guards the Gryffindor common room.
The Forbidden Forest holds magical creatures.
The Goblet of Fire chooses champions for the tournament.
The Goblet of Fire produces a magical fire.
The Hogwarts library has many magical books.
The Horcruxes contain pieces of Voldemort's soul.
The Invisibility Cloak makes the wearer invisible.
The Leaky Cauldron is a pub in London.
The Marauder's Map shows everyone's location at Hogwarts.
The Ministry of Magic governs the wizarding world.
The only one that Voldemort is afraid of is Dumbledore
The Order of the Phoenix fights against Voldemort.
The Pensieve stores memories.
The Philosopher's Stone grants immortality.
The phoenix can heal with its tears.
The prophecy is stored in the Department of Mysteries.
The prophecy mentions Harry and Voldemort.
The Resurrection Stone can bring back spirits of the dead.
The Room of Requirement appears when needed.
The Sorting Hat chooses students for houses.
The Sorting Hat speaks to new students.
The Triwizard Cup is the tournament prize.
The Triwizard Tournament is a dangerous competition.
The Veela dance during the Quidditch World Cup.
The Weasleys host Harry at their home.
Thestrals are visible only to those who saw death.
Time-Turner allows time travel.
Triwizard champions face dangerous tasks.
Vernon Dursley is Harry's uncle.
Voldemort is 50 years old
Voldemort is a dark wizard.
Voldemort is a dark wizard."
Voldemort regains his body with the help of followers.
Voldemort wants to kill Harry.
Wands are essential for performing magic.
